claim: Copilot Studio enables visual orchestration of multi-agent workflows without requiring deep coding
actionable: Use Copilot Studio to visually design and orchestrate multi-agent workflows, making agentic system development accessible to non-developers
source_title: Master Multi-Agent Orchestration In Copilot Studio

claim: Multi-agent orchestration requires clear handoff patterns between agents and explicit state management across the workflow
actionable: Define explicit handoff protocols between agents, including input/output contracts and state transitions
source_title: Master Multi-Agent Orchestration In Copilot Studio

claim: Copilot Studio integrates with Microsoft services and enterprise systems, enabling agents to interact with existing business applications
actionable: Leverage Copilot Studio's integrations with Microsoft and enterprise tools when building agents that need to interact with existing systems
source_title: Master Multi-Agent Orchestration In Copilot Studio

claim: Visual debugging in Copilot Studio helps teams understand agent behavior and troubleshoot issues in multi-agent workflows
actionable: Use Copilot Studio's visual debugging features to trace agent execution paths and identify issues in multi-agent orchestration
source_title: Master Multi-Agent Orchestration In Copilot Studio
